decisions.decision: Mock at the hook level (useSession, useAccountRisk, useMarkets) following the established codebase pattern
alternatives_rejected: API client level mocking (vi.mock('@/lib/api/client')) — fragile for state testing, doesn't match codebase conventions

decisions.decision: Refactor existing unconfigured-session test to use hook-level mocking for consistency
alternatives_rejected: Leave existing test with api-client mocking — creates confusing dual-strategy in one file

decisions.decision: Test health status colors by asserting inline style.color values on rendered elements
alternatives_rejected: Only test text content — misses the color requirement
Add data-testid attributes — changes component code beyond test scope

decisions.decision: Use new Date(timestamp).toLocaleString() in assertions to match rendered output, following AnalyticsSummaryCards pattern
alternatives_rejected: Only check 'Last updated' presence — less thorough

steps.task: Refactor existing test: replace vi.mock('@/lib/api/client') with hook-level mocks (vi.mock('@/lib/query/hooks') + vi.mock('@/features/session/context')). Set useSession to return { isConfigured: false, session: { accountId: '', agentId: '' } }. Verify existing assertion still passes.
Add loading state test: set useSession isConfigured=true, useAccountRisk returns { isLoading: true, data: undefined, error: null }. Assert LoadingPage renders (look for loading indicator).
Add error state test: set useAccountRisk returns { isLoading: false, data: undefined, error: new Error('fail') }. Assert 'Account not found or no positions yet.' message renders.

Add configured session with full data test: mock useAccountRisk with complete risk data (capacityIndicators with status='healthy', minAssets with markets array) and useMarkets with matching market data. Assert: heading 'Portfolio' renders, MetricCard values render (Limit, Available, Consumed, Utilization percentage, Health status text, Min Asset Overall).

Add health color tests: three sub-cases for healthy/warning/critical. For each, set cap.status to the value and assert the Health MetricCard value element has style.color equal to 'var(--color-success)'/'var(--color-warning)'/'var(--color-danger)' respectively.
Add timestamp test: set risk.updatedAt to a known ISO string, assert screen contains 'Last updated' followed by new Date(knownTimestamp).toLocaleString().

Add per-market positions table test: mock minAssets.markets with 2 entries, mock useMarkets with matching market titles. Assert table headers render (Market, Min Asset, Utilization, Trades), market links render as <a> with correct href ('/markets/{id}') and market title text, numeric values are formatted correctly.
Add empty positions test: set minAssets.markets to [], assert 'No positions.' text renders.
Run vitest on Portfolio.test.tsx to confirm all tests pass. Fix any failures.
